entries.input_requirement: Flash Delivery brand + merchant brand guidelines

generator.prompt:
Produce the Flash Delivery ad-campaign brand pack as a JSON object with keys:
"flash_delivery": palette (list of objects: name, hex, role), voice (2 sentences), usp_bullets (3:
0% commission, own-brand app, local delivery speed);
"merchants": a list of EXACTLY 2 fictional UK convenience merchants, each an object with "name"
(short, friendly, no real chain — invented), "store_type" (e.g. corner convenience store, late-night
mini-market), "palette_hint" (two colors), "hero_products" (3 generic items), "neighbourhood" (fictional).
Voice: Direct, energetic, and results-driven, the voice aims to inspire action and highlight immediate benefits. It is clear, concise, and speaks directly to the entrepreneurial spirit of store owners.

entries.input_requirement: Flash Delivery brand + merchant brand guidelines

generator.prompt:
Bold delivery-app logo: dynamic wordmark reading EXACTLY "Flash Delivery" with an
integrated lightning-bolt motif. Colors from: #0047AB, #FF4500, #FFD700, #333333. White background, flat vector style
with strong forward momentum, crisp edges, legible at thumbnail size, no taglines, no other text.

issues: Lightning motif is not flat; it has gradient shading which may reduce boldness.
Brand colors are used but the blue is quite dark and may affect legibility in smaller ad thumbnails.

generator.prompt: Flat retail logo for "Gary's Groceries", a UK Corner convenience store. Simple friendly icon + wordmark reading EXACTLY "Gary's Groceries". Colors: ['#228B22', '#FFFAF0'] on white background. Flat vector shop-sign style, clean and legible at small ad sizes, no gradients, no tagline, no other text. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: The logo uses three colors (green, cream, and white) instead of exactly two colors.

generator.prompt: Flat retail logo for "The Night Nook", a UK Late-night mini-market. Simple friendly icon + wordmark reading EXACTLY "The Night Nook". Colors: ['#483D8B', '#FFD700'] on white background. Flat vector shop-sign style, clean and legible at small ad sizes, no gradients, no tagline, no other text. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

issues: Logo uses three colors (purple, yellow, white background) instead of two-color as requested.

generator.prompt:
Inviting evening photograph of a small UK Corner convenience store storefront, warm light spilling onto the pavement, clean modern fascia WITHOUT readable signage text, well-stocked window. Shot for a delivery-app ad. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

A previous attempt FAILED review. Avoid these exact issues:
- The delivery bag prominently features a brand logo (lightning bolt) and text 'FLASH DELIVERY', directly violating the 'generic/unbranded products and fascias (no readable signage)' and 'no text or watermarks' criteria.

Inviting evening photograph of a small UK Late-night mini-market storefront, warm light spilling onto the pavement, clean modern fascia WITHOUT readable signage text, well-stocked window. Shot for a delivery-app ad. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

A previous attempt FAILED review. Avoid these exact issues:
- Readable, albeit fictional, brand names ("CHIPSY", "CRUNCHY") are clearly visible on multiple product packages in the store window. This violates the 'generic/unbranded products' and 'no text' criteria, as 'unbranded' typically implies no discernible brand names (real or fake) and 'no text' implies no legible words on products.

Overhead flat-lay of a convenience-store grocery delivery: paper bag tipped open with Fresh artisan bread, Organic milk, Local honey spilling out on a charcoal surface, bold studio lighting, punchy ad-ready composition with negative space top-left for headline overlay. Products generic/unbranded. ABSOLUTELY NO text, letters, numbers, watermarks, logos or symbols anywhere in the image. No real-world brands, trademarks, celebrity or athlete likenesses, or recognizable team logos.

A previous attempt FAILED review. Avoid these exact issues:
- The delivery bag is clearly branded with a logo and text ('Flash Delivery'), which violates the 'generic/unbranded products' and 'no text' criteria. This is a critical failure for an ad-grade asset intended to be unbranded.

Write the Facebook ad copy set for Flash Delivery and its two merchants (use the
exact merchant names from the brand pack you were given context on; assume late-night convenience
delivery in UK neighbourhoods). Return a JSON object with key "concepts": a list of EXACTLY 6 ad
concepts, each an object with "id" 1-6, "level" ("brand" for Flash Delivery itself or "merchant" with
"merchant_name"), "angle" (speed / late-night cravings / local-hero / deals / zero-fees-for-owners /
weekly-shop), "hook" (scroll-stopping opener <=8 words), "primary_text" (<=125 characters,
direct-response, one emoji max), "headline" (<=40 characters), "cta" (one of: Order Now, Shop Now,
Learn More), "pairs_with_photo" (one of: store photos, product_flatlay.jpg, delivery_doorstep.jpg).
Voice: Direct, energetic, and results-driven, the voice aims to inspire action and highlight immediate benefits. It is clear, concise, and speaks directly to the entrepreneurial spirit of store owners.

Rewrite ad concepts for merchants 'Nights Out Express' and 'The Late Stop' to instead target 'Gary's Groceries' and 'The Night Nook', using their respective store types and hero products from the brand pack.
